svg.title: BlackTickets AWS Architecture
svg.desc: Full AWS architecture diagram for BlackTickets event booking platform showing VPC tiers, microservices, RDS, CloudFront, SQS, Lambda, SNS, WAF, and monitoring layers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the internet connect to BlackTickets?')
sendPrompt('How does AWS WAF protect BlackTickets?')
sendPrompt('How does the Public ALB work?')
sendPrompt('Why does BlackTickets use a NAT Gateway?')
sendPrompt('What does the Internet Gateway do?')
sendPrompt('How does the React + Nginx frontend work in BlackTickets?')
sendPrompt('How does path-based routing work on the Private ALB?')
sendPrompt('What does the Identity Service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Event Service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Booking Service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Chatbot Service do?')
sendPrompt('How is RDS PostgreSQL configured in BlackTickets?')
sendPrompt('What VPC Endpoints does BlackTickets use?')
sendPrompt('How does Secrets Manager work in BlackTickets?')
sendPrompt('How does S3 + CloudFront serve images in BlackTickets?')
sendPrompt('What does CloudFront do in BlackTickets?')
sendPrompt('How does SQS decouple the Booking Service?')
sendPrompt('What does the Lambda function do for booking notifications?')
sendPrompt('How does SNS send booking confirmation emails?')
sendPrompt('What does the CloudWatch dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does CloudTrail audit BlackTickets?')
sendPrompt('How does Terraform remote state work?')
sendPrompt('How are IAM roles used in BlackTickets?')
